# Proverbs 10

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Proverbs](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Proverbs 9](../Proverbs-09/README.md)  ·  [Proverbs 11 ›](../Proverbs-11/README.md)

📖 **Full text:** [BBE](BBE.md) · [WEB](WEB.md) · [KJV](KJV.md) · [ASV](ASV.md)

## Verses (32)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | A wise son makes a glad father, but a foolish son is a sorrow to his mother. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Wealth which comes from sin is of no profit, but righteousness gives salvation from death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The Lord will not let the upright be in need of food, but he puts far from him the desire of the evil-doers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He who is slow in his work becomes poor, but the hand of the ready worker gets in wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | He who in summer gets together his store is a son who does wisely; but he who takes his rest when the grain is being cut is a son causing shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Blessings are on the head of the upright, but the face of sinners will be covered with sorrow. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The memory of the upright is a blessing, but the name of the evil-doer will be turned to dust. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The wise-hearted man will let himself be ruled, but the man whose talk is foolish will have a fall. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He whose ways are upright will go safely, but he whose ways are twisted will be made low. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | He who makes signs with his eyes is a cause of trouble, but he who makes a man see his errors is a cause of peace. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The mouth of the upright man is a fountain of life, but the mouth of the evil-doer is a bitter cup. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Hate is a cause of violent acts, but all errors are covered up by love. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | In the lips of him who has knowledge wisdom is seen; but a rod is ready for the back of him who is without sense. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Knowledge is stored up by the wise, but the mouth of the foolish man is a destruction which is near. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | The property of the man of wealth is his strong town: the poor man's need is his destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The work of the upright gives life: the increase of the evil-doer is a cause of sin. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | He who takes note of teaching is a way of life, but he who gives up training is a cause of error. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Hate is covered up by the lips of the upright man, but he who lets out evil about another is foolish. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Where there is much talk there will be no end to sin, but he who keeps his mouth shut does wisely. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | The tongue of the upright man is like tested silver: the heart of the evil-doer is of little value. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | The lips of the upright man give food to men, but the foolish come to death for need of sense. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | The blessing of the Lord gives wealth: hard work makes it no greater. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | It is sport to the foolish man to do evil, but the man of good sense takes delight in wisdom. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | The thing feared by the evil-doer will come to him, but the upright man will get his desire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | When the storm-wind is past, the sinner is seen no longer, but the upright man is safe for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | Like acid drink to the teeth and as smoke to the eyes, so is the hater of work to those who send him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | The fear of the Lord gives long life, but the years of the evil-doer will be cut short. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | The hope of the upright man will give joy, but the waiting of the evil-doer will have its end in sorrow. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | The way of the Lord is a strong tower for the upright man, but destruction to the workers of evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | The upright man will never be moved, but evil-doers will not have a safe resting-place in the land. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | The mouth of the upright man is budding with wisdom, but the twisted tongue will be cut off. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | The lips of the upright man have knowledge of what is pleasing, but twisted are the mouths of evil-doers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
